series_metadata.series_title: Referrals by the Division to Prosecutors - cemetery related
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, correspondence or records sent by the Division to prosecutors or local law enforcement. These records will include confidential information such as attorney work product or attorney client communication.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained on-site for four years from the date the referral was sent by the Division. Then paper records shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: For any records maintained in machine readable format, the records shall be maintained on-site for four years from the date the referral was sent by the Division. Then the machine readable record shall be destroyed. ; Microform: For any records maintained in microform, the records shall be maintained on-site for four years from the date the referral was sent by the Division. Then the microform shall be destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
